Class MyTree<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • MyTree<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - - generic type for my tree.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Iterable<T>
    public class MyTree<T>
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Iterable<T>
    My realisation of generic tree container with BFS and DFS iterators.

      Function that add a new vertex to list of children of chosen vertex.

      Function that add a new vertex to list of children of current vertex.

      Function that changes the parent of current vertex.

    • Method Detail

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<T> iterator()
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<T>

      • bfsIterator

        public java.util.ArrayList<T> bfsIterator​(MyTree<T> tree)

      • createTree

        public void createTree​(T val)
        Initialisation of a tree as a root and it's children.
        Parameters:
        val - - value of the root.

      • getModificationCounter

        public int getModificationCounter()
        Function that return the modificationCounter of current tree. It is needed to catch errors with changing of the tree during iteration out of Iterator.
        Returns:
        modificationCounter - value of the counter.

      • changeParent

        public void changeParent​(MyTree<T> newParent)
        Function that changes the parent of current vertex.
        Parameters:
        newParent - - parent to set.

      • getValue

        public T getValue()
        Function that returns the value of current vertex.
        Returns:
        value - the value of vertex

      • getChildren

        public java.util.List<MyTree<T>> getChildren()
        Function that returns the list of children of current vertex.
        Returns:
        the list of children

      • setValue

        public void setValue​(T val)
        Function that set the value of current vertex.
        Parameters:
        val - new value for current vertex.

      • add

        public MyTree<T> add​(T childVal)
        Function that add a new vertex to list of children of current vertex.
        Parameters:
        childVal - - value of a new vertex to add.

      • add

        public void add​(MyTree<T> parentVertex,
                T childVal)
        Function that add a new vertex to list of children of chosen vertex.
        Parameters:
        childVal - - value of a new vertex to add.
        parentVertex - - parent for a new vertex.

      • remove

        public T remove​(MyTree<T> vertex)
        Function that delete current vertex. It's children will be added to parent's list of children.
        Parameters:
        vertex - - vertex to delete.
        Returns:
        delValue - value of deleted vertex.

      • remove

        public T remove()
        remove function with another way of using. "vertexToDel.remove()" instead of "remove(vertexToDel)".
        Returns:
        - returns the value of removed vertex.

      • equals

        public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object

        public int hashCode()
        Overrides:
